rationale: El Niño confirmation is directly relevant to Portugal's elevated wildfire and drought risk this season, sustaining the baseline concern for Iberian residents.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is underway; Iberia faces heightened drought, heatwave, and wildfire risk in coming months — directly relevant to Portugal.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran deal, stock markets surge
top_events.summary: Reduced Middle East tension could ease EU energy prices modestly, providing minor indirect relief for Portuguese cost of living.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands highlighting migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Atlantic migration route through Canary Islands highlighted; some relevance to Portugal's Atlantic coast and EU migration debate.
